lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Anti-Psyker 5+, Devastating Wounds

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Fights First ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if that unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if that unit is Below Half-strength.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Prosecutors
■ Vigilators
■ Witchseekers

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Anti-Psyker 5+, Devastating Wounds

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a ^^Character, Monster^^ or ^^Vehicle^^ unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent's turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of your Command phase, this model regains 1 lost wound.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 12 ANATHEMA PSYKANA INFANTRY models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Custodian Guard
■ Custodian Wardens

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, in your Charge phase, this model's unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. While this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, in your Shooting phase, after the unit has shot, it can shoot again.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While a CHARACTER is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this unit can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Prosecutors
■ Vigilators
■ Witchseekers

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit and add 2 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) that is within Engagement Range of this model’s unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Rapid Fire 1

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a Psyker unit, that attack has the PRECISION] and [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] abilities.

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Rapid Fire 1

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Rapid Fire 1

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, when this model's unit is selected to fight, it can use this ability. If it does, until that fight is resolved, both Ka'tah Stances are active for that unit, instead of only one.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Custodian Guard
■ Custodian Wardens

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Allarus Custodians

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to this model, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Vertus Praetors

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, at the end of the Fight phase, if this model's unit fought this phase, if it is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Fall Back move or, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move.

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Assault

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Custodian Guard
■ Custodian Wardens

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack's Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristics and/or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, you can select one of the following to take effect until the end of the phase:
■ This model's Watcher's Axe melee weapon has an Attacks characteristic of 12.
■ This model has a 2+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Assault

lines.value: Assault

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Custodian Guard
■ Custodian Wardens

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, each time a melee attack targets that unit, worsen that Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, after making a Hit roll, Wound roll or saving throw for this model, you can change the result of that roll to an unmodified 6.

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Assault

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Description
lines.value: The first time this model is destroyed, remove it from play without resolving its Deadly Demise ability. Then, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with D6 wounds remaining.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 6 ADEPTUS CUSTODES INFANTRY models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, after this unit ends a normal or Advance move, you can select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTER and VEHICLE units) that it moved over during that move, then roll one D6 for each model in this unit; for each 2+, that enemy unit suffers 2 mortal wounds.

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.value: Anti-Psyker 5+, Devastating Wounds

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a melee attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

units.name: Custodian Guard with Adrasite and Pyrithite spears

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. While this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, you can re-roll the Wound roll isntead.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, at the start of your Shooting phase, this unit can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] and [IGNORES COVER abilities].

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Sustained Hits 1

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, at the start of your Shooting phase, this unit can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the Devastating Wounds ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, while this unit is on the battlefield. that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the hit roll.

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Sustained Hits 1

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Sustained Hits 1

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent's turn, if this unit is not whithin Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield. In the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, in your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not elgibile to declare a charge.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, you can target this unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0 CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem that phase.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a melee attack targets this model subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model is selected to fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if it made a Charge move this turn: on 4-5, hat enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy suffers 3 mortal wounds.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes an attack with its Twin iliastus accelerator cannon that targets an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES), that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability. Each time this model makes an attack with its Twin arachnus heavy blaze cannon that targets an enemy MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If this model is equipped with 2 Telemon caestus weapons in addition to its armoured feet weapon, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of those Telemon caestus weapons.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this ^^Transport^^ this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 8 ^^Adeptus Custodes Infantry^^ models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If a unit disembarks from this TRANSPORT before it moves, until the end of the turn, that unit is eligibile to charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 12 ADEPTUS CUSTODES INFANTRY models. This model can also transport 1 VENERABLE CONTEMPTOR DREADNOUGHt, 1 CONTEMPTOR-ACHILLUS DREADNOUGHT or 1 CONTEMPTOR GALATUS-DREADNOUGHT; while doing so, its transport capacity is reduced to 6 ADEPTUS CUSTODES INFANTRY models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move. Until the end of the turn, models in that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover. In addition, roll one D6 for eah model in that unit: for each 6, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: A
lines.value: D6
